privacy.publicUseBoundary: Do not quote Discord/Lafa text from this plan; use it only to prioritize source-backed page and route review.

reviewerRules: Treat this as evidence for existing public pages, not permission to quote Discord or Lafa.
Add new public copy only when a cited page is missing a source-backed explanation.
Promote only primary-source paraphrases; do not quote Discord or Lafa excerpts from local packets.
Keep unreviewed Discord/Lafa identity claims, Phase B economics, secrets, and financial advice in refusal lanes.

phaseOrder.label: Privacy Preflight
phaseOrder.action: Run the Discord review-artifact checker against committed data and any local /tmp packets before editorial review.
phaseOrder.acceptance: Raw Discord/Lafa excerpts stay outside the repo, raw-field checks pass, and valuesPrinted remains false.

phaseOrder.label: Page-Fit Review
phaseOrder.action: For each page-fit group, open the existing public page and confirm the cited source keys already cover the demand signal.
phaseOrder.acceptance: Keep existing source-backed public copy unless a primary-source gap is found; never quote Discord/Lafa text.

phaseOrder.label: Refusal Review
phaseOrder.action: Confirm refusal-lane items still require policy refusal rather than a new public answer.
phaseOrder.acceptance: Keep refusal behavior unless future primary-source review creates a grounded public page.

phaseOrder.label: Closeout
phaseOrder.action: Regenerate the sanitized queue and rerun verification before any public-copy change is committed.
phaseOrder.acceptance: The queue reports zero public-copy changes proposed and zero exact Discord/Lafa statements promoted.
